---
name: week1-checklist
description: "Use when: week 1 kickoff checklist, securecollab setup checklist, day-by-day implementation checklist, or repo bootstrap planning."
---

# Week 1 Checklist Skill

Generate or update a practical week-1 plan for SecureCollab with clear day-by-day tasks, exit criteria, and verification commands.

## Required Output
- Day 1 to Day 5 checklist.
- Each day includes objective, 3 to 6 concrete tasks, and done criteria.
- Simplicity-first recommendations.
- Testing and readability checks.
- Folder-structure and documentation placement checks.

## Constraints
- Keep scope limited to M0 and M1 work.
- Do not include speculative future architecture beyond immediate setup needs.
- Prefer actionable commands (`task ...`) over long explanations.
